page.title: System settings
page.description: Manage admin account security and the website information shown to customers.

websiteInfo.title: Website information
websiteInfo.description: Content used in the page title, footer, and basic metadata.

branding.title: Logo & favicon
branding.description: Upload images used for website branding.
branding.hint: A transparent logo and square favicon are recommended for the best browser tab display.

contact.title: Contact information
contact.description: Information customers see when they need support.

seo.title: SEO settings
seo.description: Optimize content displayed on search engines.

analytics.title: Analytics & tracking
analytics.description: Information used to track website performance.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Update the admin password regularly to reduce unauthorized access risk.

confirmPassword.label: Confirm new password
confirmPassword.mismatch: The confirmation password does not match

password.warning: Do not share the admin password. After changing it, review the devices that are currently signed in.

messages.setupSuccess: Two-step verification has been set up successfully
messages.backupRegenerateError: Unable to generate new backup codes
messages.removeDeviceSuccess: Device removed from the trusted list

disable.title: Disable two-step verification
disable.content: Are you sure you want to disable 2FA? This will reduce the security level of the admin account.

regenerate.title: Generate new backup codes
regenerate.content: Old codes will no longer work. Are you sure you want to generate a new set?

removeDevice.title: Remove trusted device
removeDevice.content: This device will need to verify again on the next sign-in.

setup.title: Set up two-step verification
setup.description: Complete the steps below to enable 2FA for the admin account.

app.title: Install app
app.description: Install Google Authenticator or another compatible 2FA app.

qr.title: Scan QR code
qr.description: Add the admin account to the authenticator app.

appStep.description: You need an authenticator app to generate sign-in codes. Choose one below or use a 2FA app you already have.

qrStep.description: Open your authenticator app and scan the QR code to add the account.
qrStep.manualDescription: Enter the secret key below manually in your authenticator app.

verifyStep.description: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.

main.title: Two-step verification
main.description: Enable 2FA to require a verification code from your phone when signing in to the admin area.

backup.title: Backup codes
backup.description: Use these when you no longer have your authenticator device.

tips.title: Security tips
items: Store backup codes in a safe place, separate from your main device.
Do not share verification codes or backup codes with anyone.
Review and remove devices you no longer use regularly.

backupModal.title: Two-step verification backup codes
backupModal.warningDescription: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.

backupFile.title: Two-step verification backup codes - SmartMall Admin
backupFile.note: Note: Each code can only be used once. Keep them somewhere safe.
